color_palette.emotional_logic: Deep cosmic blue (#0B1E3F) evokes the vast, mysterious primordial universe and awe of creation; regal gold (#D4AF37) symbolizes divine authority and the majestic gods; fiery orange-red (#E25822) captures the violent, intense energy of the Titan rebellion battle; pure black (#000000) grounds the scenes in the infinite void of space, emphasizing the epic scale and tension.

lighting_style: Dynamic high contrast lighting with strong directional key lights for cosmic grandeur during exposition; rapid strobe-like flashes and flickering intense rim lights during battle to convey chaos and violence; soft, ethereal glow with balanced fill for resolution scenes to evoke reverence and solemn divine decree.
texture_and_grain: Hyper-realistic digital rendering with detailed cosmic textures, subtle volumetric light rays, and smooth particle effects; no grain to maintain clarity on fast cuts but with a slight organic imperfection in light to keep it cinematic and immersive.
typography_style: Elegant serif font with classical Greek-inspired letterforms for minimal title or credits, used sparingly and subtly to avoid disrupting visual momentum.
midjourney_style_suffix: --v 6 --ar 9:16 --q 2 --style cinematic --no cartoonish, modern props, slow static shots, excessive text overlays
